description_long: This is an adult male figure with a stocky build, wearing a sleeveless tank top and straight-cut pants. He has a prominent black belt or waist support around his midsection and is wearing round sunglasses. His arms are extended slightly outward, and his hands are relaxed with fingers spread. The figure has short, neatly styled hair and is wearing formal shoes. The overall appearance suggests a casual yet slightly rugged urban pedestrian, possibly someone involved in manual labor or physical activity.
description: A stocky adult male in a sleeveless tank top, straight pants, and sunglasses, with a black waist support and formal shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face with sunglasses, sleeveless top, black waist support, and relaxed arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the thickness of the waist support, and the straight leg posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the full width of the shoulders, and the back of the waist support.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm position, and the side seam of the pants.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless tank top, straight-cut pants, wide waist support, round sunglasses
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
